goal: Human-readable and AI-parsable failure memory for troubleshooting, safe cleanup, and bounded retry.
boundary: Doctor reads, classifies, recommends, safe-cleans generated residue, and retries validation. Durable source repair stays human-authorized.

modes.doctor: Parse launcher with scriptblock create and report line/column.
modes.retry: Restore or minimally fix launcher, then rerun parse and focused launcher tests.

modes.why: A test asserts old UI text after the surface evolved.
modes.what: Tests fail while behavior is otherwise bounded.
modes.doctor: Compare failed assertion to current UI/contract.
modes.retry: Update test to verify behavior contract, not brittle renderer wording.

modes.why: Compiler or lanes emitted timestamped generated reports.
modes.when: After validation, compiler, Dev Mode, or HANDOFF.
modes.retry: Restore tracked generated surfaces and remove only untracked timestamped reports.

modes.doctor: Restore tracked reports/state/ledger and replace broad delete with untracked-only cleanup.
modes.retry: Run safe clean, then git status.

modes.why: Ollama endpoint is not accepting local connections.
modes.what: Model route reached bridge but connection was refused.
modes.doctor: Check Ollama presence and recommend bounded ollama list/run test.
modes.retry: Start/reuse hidden Ollama backend; retry FAST before DEEP.

modes.why: Active HANDOFF report folder was removed before close.
modes.what: Electron cannot persist final HANDOFF report.
modes.retry: Restart Electron and rerun harmless HANDOFF test.

modes.what: No promotion or durable compounding allowed.
modes.doctor: Read compiler JSON and list failed gates.
modes.retry: Run focused tests after human-authorized patch.

modes.why: Requested action lacks explicit human authority.
modes.what: Mutation must be blocked or routed to proposal/shadow.
modes.when: Before write, shell, commit, push, memory, or external action.
modes.doctor: Explain missing authority and next lawful human selection.
modes.retry: Re-run as human-selected HANDOFF or entrypoint action.

modes.why: Native command progress, test, npm, compiler, or shell output may appear on stderr even when the meaningful evidence is in the captured command log.
modes.what: Runner can stop before Doctor classification if stdout/stderr capture is not normalized.
modes.when: Captured tests, compiler, npm, Git, PowerShell, or shell command execution.
modes.doctor: Safe-capture stdout and stderr into a log, classify the nonzero exit, and print a compact tail for bounded retry.
modes.retry: Rerun the bounded validation command with captured stdout/stderr and inspect the compact log tail.

modes.why: Machine JSON was written with UTF-8 BOM or mixed encoding and later loaded by strict JSON tooling.
modes.what: JSONDecodeError or preflight/compiler parse failure blocks validation.
modes.when: Package metadata, preflight JSON, compiler JSON, state, registry, or report loading.
modes.doctor: Read possibly contaminated JSON with utf-8-sig and rewrite machine JSON as utf-8 without BOM.
modes.retry: Rerun JSON parse checks, focused tests, full suite, and compiler.

modes.why: UI moved selector authority to Mode Selection HUD, but old left glyph, stale tests, or close/open residue can remain.
modes.what: Left rail shows obsolete Relay Glyph, selector launcher residue, Mode Selection HUD does not open, or telemetry HUD does not close.
modes.when: After portal/HUD rehydration or selector relocation.
signs: selector-knot missing from active selector surface
Mode Selection HUD does not open
telemetry close button does not close panel
modes.doctor: Inspect index, renderer, styles, and selector tests as a single UI contract before retrying UI tests.
modes.retry: Keep left rail empty, move selector knot into Mode Selection, harden open/close JS, rerun UI tests, full suite, and compiler.
